Why Join Leaky?

Passive Income

Earn $2,000–$5,000/month with minimal effort. Get paid for what you already do.

Grow Your Following

More engagement = more followers. Leaky drives real traffic to your profile.

Join a Community

Connect with other creators. Share tips. Celebrate wins together.

No Restrictions

Works alongside Cameo, OnlyFans, Patreon. You set your own prices.

Simple Process

How It Works

1

Join

Sign up and set your prices

2

Get Requests

Fans request stories, comments, tags

3

Deliver

Got Questions?

Frequently Asked Questions

No problem! Leaky works for creators with 10K+ followers. Your engagement rate matters more than follower count. Plus, Leaky helps you grow your following over time.

Absolutely! No exclusivity required. Leaky is just another revenue stream. Use it alongside whatever else you're doing — there are no restrictions.

It depends on your niche, follower count, and engagement. Most creators make $1,000–$5,000/month. Top creators make $10,000+/month. You set your own prices.

We pay weekly via bank transfer. You'll see money in your account within 1–3 business days of a fan confirming a deal is complete.

We handle all refunds and disputes. Your job is to deliver quality content. If there's an issue, we take care of the customer — you're protected.
